languages.original_text: "If you are capable of engaging in thought experiments for days at a time, I can only express my respect, but more humble people are not so inclined."

languages.text: "Если вы способны заниматься мысленными экзерсисами несколько суток кряду, могу лишь выразить свое почтение, но более приземленные люди к этому не расположены".
"If you are capable of engaging in thought experiments for days at a time, I can only express my respect, but more humble people are not so inclined."
languages.original_text: "Если вы способны заниматься мысленными экзерсисами несколько суток кряду, могу лишь выразить свое почтение, но более приземленные люди к этому не расположены".

traits.locale_text: "If you are capable of engaging in thought experiments for days at a time, I can only express my respect, but more humble people are not so inclined."
"If you are capable of engaging in thought experiments for days at a time, I can only express my respect, but more humble people are not so inclined."
"If you are capable of engaging in thought experiments for days at a time, I can only express my respect, but more humble people are not so inclined."

languages.text: «Si es capaz de dedicarse durante días a sus ejercicios de imaginación, solo puedo expresarle mi respeto, pero la gente más humilde no cuenta con esa disciplina».
languages.original_text: "If you are capable of engaging in thought experiments for days at a time, I can only express my respect, but more humble people are not so inclined."

traits.locale_text: «Si es capaz de dedicarse durante días a sus ejercicios de imaginación, solo puedo expresarle mi respeto, pero la gente más humilde no cuenta con esa disciplina».

languages.text: 「幾日も続けて思考実験に没頭できるというのであれば、私は敬意を表するほかありませんが、より慎ましい者たちは、そうした気質を持ち合わせてはおりません」
languages.original_text: "If you are capable of engaging in thought experiments for days at a time, I can only express my respect, but more humble people are not so inclined."

traits.locale_text: 「幾日も続けて思考実験に没頭できるというのであれば、私は敬意を表するほかありませんが、より慎ましい者たちは、そうした気質を持ち合わせてはおりません」

languages.text: “如果你真能连续几天沉浸在思维实验里，那我只能表示敬佩。但凡俗大众可没这份兴致。”
languages.original_text: "If you are capable of engaging in thought experiments for days at a time, I can only express my respect, but more humble people are not so inclined."

traits.locale_text: “如果你真能连续几天沉浸在思维实验里，那我只能表示敬佩。但凡俗大众可没这份兴致。”

languages.text: "Wenn Ihr in der Lage seid, Euch tagelang mit Gedankenexperimenten zu befassen, kann ich Euch nur meinen Respekt aussprechen, aber weniger demütige Leute sehen das wohl anders."
languages.original_text: "If you are capable of engaging in thought experiments for days at a time, I can only express my respect, but more humble people are not so inclined."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn Ihr in der Lage seid, Euch tagelang mit Gedankenexperimenten zu befassen, kann ich Euch nur meinen Respekt aussprechen, aber weniger demütige Leute sehen das wohl anders."

languages.text: « Si vous êtes capable de vous plonger dans des expériences intellectuelles des jours entiers, vous avez tout mon respect, mais les personnes ordinaires n'ont pas de telles inclinations. »
languages.original_text: "If you are capable of engaging in thought experiments for days at a time, I can only express my respect, but more humble people are not so inclined."

traits.locale_text: « Si vous êtes capable de vous plonger dans des expériences intellectuelles des jours entiers, vous avez tout mon respect, mais les personnes ordinaires n'ont pas de telles inclinations. »

languages.text: "Eğer günlerce zihinsel deneyler yapabiliyorsanız size ancak saygı duyabilirim. Ancak daha mütevazı insanlar buna pek meyilli değildir."
